name: Ahmad Faiq Fawwaz
title: Embedded Systems & Robotics Engineer
tagline: Bridging hardware and intelligence — from firmware to field robots.
description: Computer Engineering student at ITS with 2+ years of hands-on experience in Robotics and Embedded Systems. I architect robotic control systems, build IoT ecosystems, and integrate AI on edge hardware.
about: I'm a Computer Engineering student at Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember (ITS) with deep experience in embedded firmware, robotics control systems, and IoT development. As Senior Programmer for VI-ROSE ITS, I architect real-time motion-planning systems that compete — and win — at the national level. I love the challenge of squeezing intelligence out of constrained hardware, whether that's a dual-core ESP32 or a Raspberry Pi at the edge.
